stemHtml:
When operating a flight with freelance cabin crew, which statement is correct?
The cabin crew member(s)...

options.a: CANNOT operate as a sole cabin crew or be nominated as the cabin crew member who is accountable to the Pilot-in-Command.
options.b: CANNOT operate as the only cabin crew member on board if they also work for another Operator, even if it is on the same aircraft type.
options.c: Must have received Operator-specific training, even it they are qualified to operate on the same aircraft type by another Operator.
options.d: May operate on an unlimited number of aircraft types provided the exit layouts are similar and they operate to the same SOPs.
